creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
if_iwm panics with a iwm3165 card when the iwm7265fw.ko module is not loaded (it used to auto-load this using the evadot branch [1])

uname -a:
FreeBSD e17 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #7 r303697: Wed Aug  3 10:41:19 CEST 2016     rene@e17:/usr/obj/usr/home/rene/freebsd/src/head/sys/GENERIC  amd64

[1] https://github.com/evadot/freebsd/tree/iwm

No coredump available now unfortunately.
